class.name: GIFReader
class.brief_description: Reads GIF files and extracts frame data.
class.description: GIFReader provides methods to open GIF files from disk or memory, extract frames as [Image] objects, and retrieve metadata such as delays, disposal methods, and loop count. Supports both file-based and buffer-based input for flexible loading scenarios including network and archive sources.

method.name: close
method.description: Closes the currently opened GIF file or buffer. Returns [constant GIFReader.SUCCEEDED] on success.

method.name: get_aspect_byte
method.description: Returns the pixel aspect ratio byte from the GIF header.

method.name: get_background_color
method.description: Returns the background color specified in the GIF global color table.

method.name: get_color_map
method.description: Returns the global color map as a Dictionary with [code]colors[/code] (PackedColorArray) and [code]count[/code] (int).

method.name: get_color_resolution
method.description: Returns the color resolution bits specified in the GIF header.

method.name: get_comments
method.description: Returns all comment text blocks found in the GIF file.

method.name: get_disposal_method
method.description: Returns the disposal method for the specified frame, indicating how the frame should be cleared before the next frame is rendered.

method.name: get_frame_delay
method.description: Returns the delay time in milliseconds for the specified frame.

method.name: get_frame_gcb
method.description: Returns the Graphics Control Block data for the specified frame as a Dictionary containing delay, disposal method, and transparent color index.

method.name: get_frame_raw_data
method.description: Returns raw frame data including palette indices, palette colors, and metadata. Useful for custom compositing.

method.name: get_global_metadata
method.description: Returns global GIF metadata including version, canvas size, background color, and aspect ratio.

method.name: get_image
method.description: Returns the specified frame as an [Image] object. Frame index starts at 0.

method.name: get_image_count
method.description: Returns the total number of frames in the GIF.

method.name: get_loop_count
method.description: Returns the loop count specified in the Netscape application extension. 0 means infinite loop.

method.name: get_saved_images
method.description: Returns all frames as an array of [Image] objects.

method.name: get_size
method.description: Returns the virtual canvas size of the GIF as Vector2i(width, height).

method.name: open
method.description: Opens a GIF file from the specified path. Returns an error code indicating success or failure.

method.name: open_from_buffer
method.description: Opens a GIF from a memory buffer. Useful for loading from network downloads or archive files.

constants.constant: Pixel data size exceeds width * height.
Restore to background color before rendering next frame.
Do not dispose, keep current frame visible.
Restore to previous frame before rendering next frame.
Disposal method not specified in the GIF.
Image data is defective or corrupted.
No global or local color map found.
Not enough memory to allocate required structures.
File is not a valid GIF file.
File is not open for reading.
Failed to open the specified file.
